name: Deliver That Pizza - Puzzle Game - Demo

reviews.review_description: I am truly stupid so I can't solve nun and this game, OMG, its so ------- hard, but it is also so good. And another thing, DEVELOPERS PLEASE FIX THE BUG WHERE YOU CAN FLY AROUND WITH THE NOTE IF YOU CROUCH AND GRAB IT UNDER  YOU

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your feedback and for reporting the bug! We will check and try to resolve this as soon as possible.

Update: It is fixed.
